references.reason: An airwell lets the library's elemental logistics become a visible, ventilated problem.
A dust ward makes careful library maintenance actionable without turning Patchouli's limits into a gag.
An elemental shelf supports precise questions and safe placement.
The first route observation records effort budgeting and a respected pause.
An annotation table makes the quality and scope of a question visible.
A margin records an exact question without demanding an immediate answer.
A closed catalog makes trivia and access boundaries explicit.
The journal records curiosity that respects a question’s scope and the right not to answer.
A two-seat alcove permits shared reading without requiring shared conversation.
Separate bookmarks show that the readers may keep different places and different books.
A visible switch makes disabled companion comments an authored boundary rather than missing feedback.
The journal records that quiet attention can be shared without becoming a performance.
A return desk gives Patchouli and Marisa a concrete place to negotiate access and responsibility.
The ledger records due care without treating a borrower as a caricature.
Annotations show Marisa’s research work and the risks of untracked access.
The journal records a library rule that protects both research and responsibility.
A casting dais makes the conceptual margin visible as a shared, bounded task.
A margin glyph shows where the protagonist may stabilize the spell without taking over Patchouli’s casting.
An abort marker makes pausing or accepting assistance a valid authored outcome.
The conceptual-margin minigame tests shared attention with clear, assist-clear, and loss-continuing outcomes.
The journal records a spell completed through bounded cooperation rather than endurance or takeover.
The Archive’s predictive volume appears in a stack where knowledge can be compared with authorship.
A complete volume makes every predicted future conversation materially tempting and invasive.
Blank final folios preserve future questions and answers that neither person has chosen yet.
The journal records Patchouli choosing incomplete knowledge over a prewritten relationship.
A reserved desk makes continued reading available without requiring conversation or ownership.
A desk card records the friendship invitation as a standing, revisable arrangement.
A no-due-date card names the romance future while its added rules preserve return, revision, and independent work.
Friendship reserves a reading desk without requiring performance.
Romance names an open-ended borrowing card whose rules prevent ownership.
The desk and future may remain unassigned without penalty.
An unindexed future remains neither missing nor claimed.
